acceptance_criteria:
1. cargo test --workspace passes
2. cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
3. cargo doc builds without warnings
4. REPLHistory works with new system
5. Typed formatting output matches expectations
6. Budget truncation verified
7. #[format] compile error verified
8. All integration tests pass
9. Ready for merge
description:
Final verification bead - ensure the entire render system overhaul is complete and all tests pass.

Verification checklist:
```bash
# 1. Full test suite
cargo test --workspace

# 2. No warnings in main crates
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

# 3. Documentation builds
cargo doc --workspace --no-deps

# 4. Example signatures still work
cargo test --package dspy-rs --test integration_tests
```

Manual verification:
1. REPLHistory renders correctly with new system
2. Typed prompt formatting produces same output as before
3. Budget truncation works (not errors)
4. Union resolution is deterministic
5. #[format] usage produces clear compile error
6. #[render(...)] compile-time validation catches bad templates

Documentation updates:
1. Update any rustdoc examples
2. Update CHANGELOG with migration notes
3. Update any internal docs referencing the old system
title: Final verification: all tests pass with new render system
